title: Autumn's Screenshot Studio
description: Fabric modpack with tools for Minecraft filmmakers and photographers 📸
body:
# **Lights, F5, action!**

This is a lightweight Fabric modpack that's essentially a toolkit for creating mock screenshots and realistic or cinematic gameplay footage. This was created for a personal project initially, but I decided to make this public with Minecraft webseries and machinima creators in mind. It is NOT intended for Survival!

Some notable mods I've added are Axiom, BBS, Carpet, and Replay Mod. Included are optional resource packs and mods that hide particles and re-add beta/alpha features.
